selection: 按 7–10 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: a. 极大的, 巨大的, 无限的
words.definition: s. unusually great in size or amount or degree or especially extent or scope

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 洞, 穴；vi. 凹陷, 塌落
words.definition: n. a geological formation consisting of an underground enclosure with access from the surface of the ground or from the sea

words.translation: n. 耳朵, 倾听, 听觉, 穗；vi. 抽穗
words.definition: n. the sense organ for hearing and equilibrium

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 野餐, 远足, 愉快的经历；vi. 去野餐, 远足
words.definition: n. any informal meal eaten outside or on an excursion

words.translation: n. 嘴, 口, 口腔, 口状物；vi. 装腔作势说话, 做鬼脸
words.definition: n. the opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge

words.translation: n. 早餐
words.definition: n. the first meal of the day (usually in the morning)

words.translation: n. 仙女, 精灵；a. 仙女的
words.definition: n. a small being, human in form, playful and having magical powers

words.translation: n. 栅栏, 界线, 范围；a. 苍白的, 暗淡的, 无力的
words.definition: v. turn pale, as if in fear

words.translation: n. 小人物, 无名小卒；pron. 无人, 没有人
words.definition: n a person of no influence

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 锯子, 谚语；vt. 锯, 锯开, 来回移动
words.definition: n. hand tool having a toothed blade for cutting

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
words.definition: s very small

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 微笑, 喜色, 笑容；vi. 微笑, 觉得好笑
words.definition: n. a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement

words.translation: n. 乳酪, 奶油, 面霜
words.definition: n. the best people or things in a group

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子
words.definition: n. headdress that protects the head from bad weather; has shaped crown and usually a brim

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: n. 鼻子, 突出部分, 嗅觉；vt. 嗅到, 探出, 用鼻子触
words.definition: n. the organ of smell and entrance to the respiratory tract; the prominent part of the face of man or other mammals

words.translation: n. 粉红色, 石竹花, 化身, 典范, 头面人物, 极度；a. 粉红的, 石竹科的, 比较激进的, 脸色发红的, 精致的, 有点下流的
words.definition: n. a light shade of red

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: n. abstaining from food

words.translation: n. 枪
words.definition: n. a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: a. 软的, 温和的, 柔和的, 柔滑的, 温柔的, 软弱的, 坡度小的, 笨的, 纸币的；n. 柔软的东西, 笨人, 纸币
words.definition: a. yielding readily to pressure or weight

words.translation: n. 触觉, 碰, 触, 机灵, 轻触, 格调, 少许, 缺点, 弹力；vt. 接触, 触摸, 触及, 使接触, 达到, 涉及, 影响到, 使轻度受害, 感动
words.definition: n. the event of something coming in contact with the body

words.translation: abbr. had not 没有
n. 舌, 语言能力, 讲话方式, 语言；vt. 舔, 斥责, 发...的音
words.definition: n. a mobile mass of muscular tissue covered with mucous membrane and located in the oral cavity

words.translation: n. 咳嗽；vi. 咳嗽
words.definition: n. a sudden noisy expulsion of air from the lungs that clears the air passages; a common symptom of upper respiratory infection or bronchitis or pneumonia or tu

words.translation: 他是, 他有
n. 吻；vt. 吻
words.definition: n. the act of caressing with the lips (or an instance thereof)

words.translation: a. 孤单的, 孤寂的, 荒凉的
words.definition: s. marked by dejection from being alone

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地
words.definition: a. characterized by or producing sound of great volume or intensity

words.translation: a. 可爱的, 有趣的
words.definition: s. appealing to the emotions as well as the eye

words.translation: n. 吼, 咆哮, 轰鸣；vi. 吼, 大声说出, 叫喊, 喧闹
words.definition: n. the sound made by a lion

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: n. 天鹅绒；a. 天鹅绒的
words.definition: n. a silky densely piled fabric with a plain back

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: n. 午后, 下午
words.definition: n. the part of the day between noon and evening

words.translation: vt. 想像, 设想, 猜测；vi. 想像起来
words.definition: v. form a mental image of something that is not present or that is not the case

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃
words.definition: n. a sudden and decisive increase

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 星期日；a. 星期日的, 业余的
words.definition: n. first day of the week; observed as a day of rest and worship by most Christians

words.translation: vt. 推想, 假设, 以为, 想像, 假定；vi. 料想
words.definition: v. express a supposition

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑

words.translation: n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: a. 受惊吓的, 受惊的, (非正式)害怕...的
words.definition: s. made afraid

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 胸, 胸部, 衣柜, 箱子

words.translation: n. 关闭；vt. 关上, 闭起, 幽禁, 合拢, 轧住
words.definition: a. not open

words.translation: a. 平滑的, 平稳的, 流畅的, 和蔼的, 安祥的, 圆滑的, 调匀的, 无毛的；vt. 使光滑, 烫平, 使平和, 消除
words.definition: n. the act of smoothing

words.translation: n. 糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜语；vt. 加糖于, 使甜蜜, 粉饰, 美化

words.translation: num. 五十, 五十个

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒

words.definition: v. observe, check out, and look over carefully or inspect

words.translation: vt. 忘记, 忽略, 忘；vi. 忘记

words.translation: 他将, 他愿意, 他必须, 他要

words.translation: adv. 作为替代, 反而

words.translation: n. 胡椒粉, 胡椒, 辣椒

words.translation: a. 厚的, 粗壮的, 浓的, 迟钝的, 浑浊的, 多雾的, 过分的, 口齿不清的；adv. 厚地, 密地, 浓浓地
